levelList.name: 充刀流-揮斬

[WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得5層[Charge]

levelList.name: 充刀流-碎斬
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 消耗5層[Charge]并使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+2)
[WhenUse] 若本技能消耗的[Charge]層数不低于5層，則使本技能増加的[Burst]強度額外+2
[WhenUse] 若本技能消耗了10層[Charge]，則対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加3層[Burst]
[WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Charge]層数在5~9層之間，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加2×(13-現存[Charge]層数)級[Burst]強度并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得至10層[Charge]
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-75%，且本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>不会使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>陷入混乱

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>造成相当于其[Burst]強度的<color=#A6FE00>暴食</color><color=#ffffff>傷害</color>，并使其[Burst]層数減少1層(最多30点)
[OnSucceedAttack] 使用本技能時每消耗了5層[Charge]，対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加2層[Burst](最多4層)

levelList.name: 充刀流-流斬
levelList.desc: [WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得5層[Charge]

levelList.name: 充拳流-相触
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有4級[Burst]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+2)
[WhenUse] 対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加3層[Charge]

levelList.name: 充拳流-揮撃
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有5級[Burst]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+2)
[WhenUse] 消耗<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的5層[Charge]并使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1
[WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Charge]層数在5~9層之間，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加2×(13-現存[Charge]層数)級[Burst]強度并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得至10層[Charge](<color=#7C5738>每回合</color>最多1次)
[WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得5層[Charge]

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Charge]強度不低于2級，則対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加2層[Burst]

levelList.name: 充拳流-摧毀
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有6級[Burst]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+2)
[WhenUse] 消耗5層[Charge]并使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+3)
[WhenUse] 若本技能消耗的[Charge]層数不低于5層，則使本技能増加的[Burst]強度額外+2級
[WhenUse] 若本技能消耗了10層[Charge]，則対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加3層[Burst]
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-80%，且本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>不会使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>陷入混乱

coindescs.desc:
[OnSucceedAttack] 若本技能消耗了[Charge]層数，則対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加10層[OminousTalisman]
- 若消耗的[Charge]層数不低于10層，則対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加(消耗的[Charge]層数-10)層[Burst]
[UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] 若使用本技能時消耗的[Charge]層数不低于5層，則対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加10層[OminousTalisman]
[WinDuelAttack] 若使用本技能時消耗的[Charge]層数不低于10層，則消耗<color=#ffffff>目標</color>所有[OminousTalisman]

levelList.name: 充拳流-匯流而聚
levelList.desc: [WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得5層[Charge]

levelList.name: 超速侍衛
levelList.desc:
[CanDuelGuard]
[BeforeUse] 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[SupportProtect]層数不低于2層，則改為使用“黑獣 - 卯 奥義-云解顕現”
[WhenUse] 本場戦斗<color=#ffffff>自身</color>每累計失去<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限5%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>，使本技能的防御等級+1(最多+10)
[WhenUse] 直到本技能結束，<color=#ffffff>自身</color>不会陷入混乱

levelList.name: 黑獣 - 卯 奥義-云解顕現
levelList.desc:
<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>与<color=#ffffff>目標</color>每<color=#7C5738>相差</color>2点，使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+20%(最多+60%)
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有5級[Burst]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+3)
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有2層[Burst]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>+1(最多+3)

levelList.name: 風卷残云
levelList.desc:
[CantDuel]
[CantChangeTarget]
本技能攻撃鴻璐以外的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使用黑獣 - 卯使除鴻璐以外的<color=#ffffff>全体</color>人格陷入混乱，并解除<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的混乱
[EndSkill] 結束<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>
